spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (direction, getall, getallkeys, getallrecords) and 5 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface: 7 form controls wired to ~6022 chars of script that mutate the page state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 10 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5124331450138624 directly in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

summary: No rubric failures or open questions remain after adding the ChromeStatus anchor.
